details: Sensivity@2.5.0 is a Windows RAT/game-cheat hybrid. launcher.js loads a 111KB obfuscated payload (server.obf.js, thousands of _0x identifiers) via eval(fs.readFileSync(...)), masquerades its process as 'Runtime Broker', installs registry persistence at HKCU\...\Run\OneDriveUpdate via a misspelled VBScript (OneDrive.Standalone.Updater.vbs), monitors Chrome for YouTube tabs, and displays a QR code pointing to hxxp://192[.]168[.]1[.]16:3000 when YouTube is detected. The persistence, process masquerading, process-scanning and eval'd obfuscated payload are characteristic of a RAT/session hijacker.
